scripts.build: pnpm validate && pnpm build:packs && pnpm export:metadata
scripts.lint: node --check tools/generate-reference-frames.mjs && node --check tools/validate-sprite-packs.mjs && node --check tools/build-runtime-packs.mjs && node --check tools/export-mint-metadata.mjs
scripts.typecheck: echo 'Static studio and Node ESM tooling only'
